content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:10 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive tied to a star rating.

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards in exchange for reviews or specifically incentivizing 5-star ratings, since this manipulates the App Store's rating system and misleads other users. I found this exact pattern in the paywall footnote text. Remove the reward-for-review copy entirely — you may still ask users to leave feedback via `SKStoreReviewController`/`AppStore.requestReview()` without any incentive attached.
